---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature, item, framework, backend, or language
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem statement

What problem are you trying to solve? Who is affected? Be specific about the user and the situation.

## Proposed solution

How do you think this should work? Sketch the user-facing behavior.

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you think about? Why did you reject them?

## Affected axes

Which dimensions of the app does this touch? (Check all that apply.)

- [ ] Language (TR / EN / new language)
- [ ] Explanation style (Simple / Technical)
- [ ] Framework (Flutter, React Native, Swift, Kotlin, Expo, PWA, or new)
- [ ] Backend (Firebase, Supabase, Appwrite, PocketBase, Amplify, Convex, Custom, Local dev, No backend, or new)
- [ ] UI / UX
- [ ] Other (please describe below)

## Additional context

Mockups, screenshots, links to related issues, references to similar features in other apps, etc.
